name: OpenBrain (local, Apple Silicon)
description: Fully-local, single-user OpenBrain implementation for Apple Silicon: Bun MCP server + local MLX embeddings (1024-dim) + Postgres/pgvector. Mirrors OB1's canonical MCP tools and adopts its agent-memory trust-ladder governance.

openbrain_compat.note: Self-description following OB1's .github/metadata.schema.json vocabulary. requires.open_brain is false because this project *is* an OpenBrain, not a contribution that plugs into a hosted one.
openbrain_compat.governance: Trust ladder (provenance_status / created_by), evidence-vs-instruction use policy, content-fingerprint dedup, append-only memory_audit, review lifecycle via the ReviewMemory tool.
openbrain_compat.deferred: Agent Memory wire API (/recall, /writeback) matching openbrain.openclaw.*.v1 — documented in the strategy doc, not yet implemented.
